name: sticker
label: 贴纸 / Sticker
preamble: Die-cut glossy vinyl sticker style: each subject has a thick clean white die-cut border hugging its silhouette, bold saturated candy colours, a subtle glossy highlight, playful and cute, only a very soft shadow.

construction.grid: matched subject scale; consistent live area
construction.stroke: thick uniform white die-cut border around each subject
construction.fill_rule: bold saturated fills with a subtle glossy highlight
construction.color_rule: candy palette; consistent border thickness and highlight placement
construction.shared_parts: consistent border weight and gloss across the set
construction.shadow: very soft only, none cast on background

notes: The white die-cut border is part of the subject and is kept by cutout.
